Impact: Hard to reason about side effects and repaint cost
Recommendation: Split renderSummary from booking panel refresh and use targeted updates

Impact: Can wipe unrelated app data for same origin

Recommendation: Store minimized payload + expiry or use sessionStorage

Recommendation: Consolidate into one router with explicit phases

Recommendation: Centralize modal registry and close policy

Risk: Multiple timeout IDs and run IDs
Impact: Race risk reduced but still non-trivial to maintain

Risk: Hard lock spread across state + CSS + handlers
Impact: Regressions likely when changing markup/state order
